400.title: Bad Request
400.description: The request could not be understood by the server.
400.hint: Please check your request and try again.

401.title: Unauthorized
401.description: You need to be authenticated to access this page.
401.hint: Please log in and try again.

403.title: Forbidden
403.description: You don't have permission to access this resource.
403.hint: Please contact support if you believe this is an error.

404.title: Not Found
404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
404.hint: Please check the URL and try again.

405.title: Method Not Allowed
405.description: The request method is not allowed for this resource.
405.hint: Please check the request method and try again.

406.title: Not Acceptable
406.description: The server cannot produce a response matching the acceptable values.
406.hint: Please adjust your request and try again.

408.title: Request Timeout
408.description: The server timed out waiting for the request.

409.title: Conflict
409.description: The request could not be completed due to a conflict.
409.hint: Please resolve the conflict and try again.

410.title: Gone
410.description: The requested resource is no longer available.
410.hint: The resource has been permanently removed.

411.title: Length Required
411.description: The request did not specify the length of its content.
411.hint: Please include the content length and try again.

412.title: Precondition Failed
412.description: The server does not meet one of the preconditions.
412.hint: Please check the preconditions and try again.

413.title: Payload Too Large
413.description: The request payload is too large.
413.hint: Please reduce the payload size and try again.

414.title: URI Too Long
414.description: The URI provided was too long for the server to process.
414.hint: Please use a shorter URL and try again.

415.title: Unsupported Media Type
415.description: The media format is not supported by the server.
415.hint: Please use a supported media format and try again.

416.title: Range Not Satisfiable
416.description: The range specified cannot be fulfilled.
416.hint: Please check the range and try again.

417.title: Expectation Failed
417.description: The server cannot meet the requirements of the Expect request-header.
417.hint: Please adjust your expectations and try again.

418.title: I'm a teapot
418.description: The server refuses to brew coffee because it is a teapot.
418.hint: This is a joke status code. Please try a different request.

422.title: Unprocessable Entity
422.description: The request was well-formed but contains semantic errors.
422.hint: Please check your input and try again.

423.title: Locked
423.description: The resource that is being accessed is locked.
423.hint: Please wait and try again later.

424.title: Failed Dependency
424.description: The request failed because it depended on another request that failed.
424.hint: Please resolve the dependency issue and try again.

425.title: Too Early
425.description: The server is unwilling to risk processing a request that might be replayed.

426.title: Upgrade Required
426.description: The server refuses to perform the request using the current protocol.
426.hint: Please upgrade your protocol and try again.

428.title: Precondition Required
428.description: The server requires the request to be conditional.
428.hint: Please include the required precondition and try again.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.description: You have sent too many requests in a given amount of time.
429.hint: Please wait a moment and try again.

431.title: Request Header Fields Too Large
431.description: The server is unwilling to process the request because its header fields are too large.
431.hint: Please reduce the header size and try again.

451.title: Unavailable For Legal Reasons
451.description: The resource is unavailable due to legal reasons.
451.hint: This resource is not available in your region.

500.title: Internal Server Error
500.description: Something went wrong on our end. We're working to fix it.
500.hint: Please try again later or contact support if the problem persists.

501.title: Not Implemented
501.description: The server does not support the functionality required to fulfill the request.
501.hint: This feature is not available yet.

502.title: Bad Gateway
502.description: The server received an invalid response from an upstream server.

503.title: Service Unavailable
503.description: The server is temporarily unable to handle the request.

504.title: Gateway Timeout
504.description: The server did not receive a timely response from an upstream server.

505.title: HTTP Version Not Supported
505.description: The server does not support the HTTP protocol version used in the request.
505.hint: Please use a supported HTTP version.

506.title: Variant Also Negotiates
506.description: The server has an internal configuration error.

507.title: Insufficient Storage
507.description: The server is unable to store the representation needed to complete the request.
507.hint: Please try again later or contact support.

508.title: Loop Detected
508.description: The server detected an infinite loop while processing the request.

510.title: Not Extended
510.description: Further extensions to the request are required.
510.hint: Please provide the required extensions and try again.

511.title: Network Authentication Required
511.description: Network authentication is required to access this resource.
511.hint: Please authenticate with the network and try again.
